司令官のお部屋、掃除しますね！ わたし、掃除が得意なんですよ！<br>重たいもの:
I'll clean your room, Commander! I'm really good at cleaning, you
know! I can lift even heavy things, hup! Because I'm an automaton!
では、まずはベッドの下から。持ち上げて掃除しちゃいます。<br>埃は、こういうと:
Alright, first I'll start from under the bed. I'll lift it up and clean
underneath. Dust tends to collect in places like this, you know.
……あれ？ 本がいっぱいあります。表紙に女性が描かれていて――<br>司令官。こ:
Huh? There are so many books here. The covers have women on
them... Commander, what are these books?
芸術の教本、ですか――なるほど！<br>司令官は勤勉ですね！ 尊敬します……！: Art textbooks? I see! Commander, you are so diligent! I admire you!
